tasks.title: Amend advance-meta provider-agent specs for single ADV runtime
tasks.verification: Spec amendments completed. Verification: JSON parse passed via adv_run_test; checkpoint commit 8c48a1803035eaaf8a5afcbd118939f5cdccd455 created.
tasks.summary: Updated `advance-meta` provider requirements from generated `adv-{provider}` runtime agents to a single complete `adv.md` runtime agent with runtime provider-hint injection. Amended provider metrics requirements and scoped ADV instruction requirement. Updated generated docs section and spec assertion coverage in `plugin/src/sync-global.test.ts`.
tasks.implementation_summary: Updated `advance-meta` provider requirements from generated `adv-{provider}` runtime agents to a single complete `adv.md` runtime agent with runtime provider-hint injection. Amended provider metrics requirements and scoped ADV instruction requirement. Updated generated docs section and spec assertion coverage in `plugin/src/sync-global.test.ts`.

tasks.title: Implement runtime provider hint injection in the ADV system block
tasks.verification: RED: system-block tests failed with 4 provider-hint expectations before implementation. GREEN: `./node_modules/.bin/vitest run src/utils/system-block.test.ts` passes (57 tests).

tasks.title: Simplify sync-global provider assembly to one ADV runtime agent
tasks.verification: Sync simplification completed. Verification: RED old tests failed, GREEN targeted sync/overlay tests passed and script syntax passed. Checkpoint commit fab6b191880f462f761f43dc5577175ca9c643e0.
tasks.summary: Reworked `sync-global.sh` to assemble one complete global `adv.md` runtime agent containing canonical ADV body plus `ADV_INSTRUCTIONS.md`, removed provider variant generation/prompt-ref/runtime-canary/drift logic, removed provider variant cleanup exemption, and added stale retired provider prompt cleanup. Updated sync/overlay tests for no generated provider runtime agents, stale provider cleanup, and no provider prompt config patching.
tasks.implementation_summary: Reworked `sync-global.sh` to assemble one complete global `adv.md` runtime agent containing canonical ADV body plus `ADV_INSTRUCTIONS.md`, removed provider variant generation/prompt-ref/runtime-canary/drift logic, removed provider variant cleanup exemption, and added stale retired provider prompt cleanup. Updated sync/overlay tests for no generated provider runtime agents, stale provider cleanup, and no provider prompt config patching.

tasks.title: Update provider evaluation metrics for single-agent architecture
tasks.verification: Provider eval metrics update completed. Verification: sync-global structural test passed and provider-eval help runs with Bun. Checkpoint commit e1ac8d3d614cba315d9613572abdcbd64171bd45.
tasks.summary: Updated provider evaluation metrics for the single-agent architecture: canonical ADV prompt, ADV protocol instructions, provider hint, selected runtime prompt, and avoided retired provider variant file size. Removed generated_provider_file as a required/canonical metric and changed prompt composition so baseline includes canonical ADV plus ADV_INSTRUCTIONS, with provider hint added as runtime-style delta.
tasks.implementation_summary: Updated provider evaluation metrics for the single-agent architecture: canonical ADV prompt, ADV protocol instructions, provider hint, selected runtime prompt, and avoided retired provider variant file size. Removed generated_provider_file as a required/canonical metric and changed prompt composition so baseline includes canonical ADV plus ADV_INSTRUCTIONS, with provider hint added as runtime-style delta.

tasks.title: Rewrite provider-agent docs and smoke checklist for manual migration
tasks.verification: Rewrote provider-agent docs and smoke checklist for single ADV runtime/manual migration. Updated README, AGENTS, ADV_INSTRUCTIONS, and stale gate comment to remove current-facing provider-agent architecture language. Checkpoint commit: 830de3df2696cbb3ae857a7194672e516fe38d60. Verification: `git diff --check` exit 0; targeted stale-reference searches show only historical or intentional retired-agent/migration references.
tasks.summary: Replaced generated provider-agent assembly docs with single ADV runtime/provider-hint architecture; updated smoke checklist for retired provider agents, runtime hints, manual config cleanup, OMP follow-up boundary, metrics, and drift checks. Refreshed README and repo instructions to describe one `adv` orchestrator with runtime provider hints instead of provider-named agents. Updated a gate-boundary comment to avoid stale adv-gpt/adv-claude actor wording.
tasks.implementation_summary: Replaced generated provider-agent assembly docs with single ADV runtime/provider-hint architecture; updated smoke checklist for retired provider agents, runtime hints, manual config cleanup, OMP follow-up boundary, metrics, and drift checks. Refreshed README and repo instructions to describe one `adv` orchestrator with runtime provider hints instead of provider-named agents. Updated a gate-boundary comment to avoid stale adv-gpt/adv-claude actor wording.

tasks.title: Final verification for single ADV provider-agent refactor
tasks.verification: Final verification passed and checkpoint committed: 540b8478b2c8a688b0316f9be78da65b32bdd738. Evidence: bash -n scripts/sync-global.sh passed; provider-eval --help passed; targeted vitest for system-block/overlay-sync/sync-global passed (129 tests); pnpm run check passed; pnpm test passed; pnpm run build passed; git diff --check passed. Remediated stale doc assertion and git.test full-suite flake; reverted pnpm-lock drift before checkpoint.
tasks.summary: Updated final verification assertions to match the single ADV runtime/provider-hint docs. Applied Prettier to touched TypeScript files. Fixed a full-suite git utility test flake by replacing callback-style `execFile('touch')` awaited as a promise with `fs/promises.writeFile`, ensuring README.md exists before git add during parallel full-suite execution. Verified the complete plugin check, test, and build path.
tasks.implementation_summary: Updated final verification assertions to match the single ADV runtime/provider-hint docs. Applied Prettier to touched TypeScript files. Fixed a full-suite git utility test flake by replacing callback-style `execFile('touch')` awaited as a promise with `fs/promises.writeFile`, ensuring README.md exists before git add during parallel full-suite execution. Verified the complete plugin check, test, and build path.

execution.approval_evidence: All 6 planned tasks are done and checkpointed. Final verification evidence: bash -n scripts/sync-global.sh passed; provider-eval --help passed; targeted vitest passed (129 tests); pnpm run check passed; pnpm test passed; pnpm run build passed; git diff --check passed. Latest checkpoint commit: 540b8478b2c8a688b0316f9be78da65b32bdd738.

acceptance.approval_evidence: User accepted delivered implementation with reply: "approve" after execution handoff. Acceptance confirms single ADV runtime/provider-hint refactor satisfies agreement.

release.approval_evidence: User signed off archive/release with Tier B reply: "sign off". Worktree clean before archive; all prior gates complete.
